LoginPage.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
LoginPage.registrationSuccessMessage: Account created successfully! Please sign in.

hero.headline: Help new engineers ramp up with clear learning tracks, GitHub PR review, and measurable progress.
hero.description: RAMP UP turns engineering onboarding into a guided system: courses, docs, exercises, GitHub submissions, and mentor feedback.

dashboardPreview.ariaLabel: Static preview of the RAMP UP learner dashboard

curriculum.title: Preview the journey from setup to PR review.
curriculum.description: Each stage groups docs, exercises, and completion criteria so a new engineer always knows the next step.

foundation.title: Product foundation and environment
foundation.description: Understand product context, repository structure, local setup, and the team's required conventions.

implementation.title: Practice with tasks close to the real codebase
implementation.description: Work through small frontend/backend exercises with clear acceptance criteria and real team workflow.

review.title: Review, feedback, and progress tracking
review.description: Submit GitHub PRs, receive mentor feedback, complete rubrics, and track XP/level growth.

activity.title: Give every engineer the same clear path from docs to reviewed work.

learn.title: Learn curated internal docs
learn.description: Follow a focused path of product notes, architecture guides, and team runbooks.

practice.title: Practice with realistic exercises
practice.description: Work on tasks close to the real codebase with clear acceptance criteria and context.

submit.title: Submit a GitHub PR
submit.description: Send work through the same review rhythm the team uses for production changes.

xp.title: Receive feedback and XP
xp.description: Get mentor review, close skill gaps, and make progress visible.

finalCta.title: Turn engineering onboarding into a repeatable, measurable, practical workflow.
finalCta.description: Move beyond scattered old wiki pages. Build an onboarding system that can scale with the engineering team.

footer.description: A platform for onboarding developers with learning tracks, practical exercises, and structured mentorship.
footer.copyright: Copyright 2026 RAMP UP Inc. All rights reserved.
